test_frameworks.name: pytest (shared)
test_frameworks.scope: Python DDL analysis tests in tests/unit/. Run via: cd plugin/lib && uv run pytest

test_frameworks.name: pytest (ddl-mcp)
test_frameworks.scope: MCP DDL server tests in plugin/mcp/ddl/tests/. Run via: cd plugin/mcp/ddl && uv run pytest

test_frameworks.name: promptfoo
test_frameworks.scope: LLM eval harness in tests/evals/. Run via: cd tests/evals && npm run eval

applications.name: ad-migration plugin
applications.description: DDL analysis and migration pipeline. Single unified plugin with commands and skills. Loaded via: claude --plugin-dir plugin/

plugin_manifest.description: Plugin manifest for the unified ad-migration plugin.

sandbox_backends.description: Technology-specific sandbox backends for test harness. base.py: abstract SandboxBackend interface. sql_server.py: pyodbc-based SQL Server sandbox lifecycle (schema cloning via SELECT INTO, proc cloning via OBJECT_DEFINITION, scenario execution). oracle.py: oracledb-based Oracle sandbox lifecycle (schema-level via CREATE USER, table cloning via CTAS, proc cloning via ALL_SOURCE, scenario execution with NLS date handling).

shared_python.description: Python library for DDL analysis. Modules: loader.py (DDL parsing facade), loader_data.py (data structures for parsed DDL entries), loader_io.py (DDL file I/O), loader_parse.py (control-flow-aware leaf parsing and reference extraction), block_segmenter.py (T-SQL control-flow block segmentation for IF/ELSE, WHILE, TRY/CATCH, BEGIN/END), tsql_utils.py (shared T-SQL masking helpers for routing scans and segmentation), routing.py (T-SQL routing flag detection — all EXEC/control-flow regex patterns and scan_routing_flags(); extracted from catalog.py to break the catalog↔loader_parse circular import), discover.py (catalog-mandatory list/show/refs CLI + write-back CLI routing), view_analysis.py (sqlglot-based view SQL element extraction — JOINs, CTEs, aggregations, window functions), catalog_writer.py (schema-validated catalog write-back operations — run_write_statements, run_write_scoping, run_write_view_scoping, run_write_source, run_write_table_slice), init.py (migration project scaffolding — SourceConfig registry, run_scaffold_project, run_scaffold_hooks, CLI), init_templates.py (per-technology template functions for CLAUDE.md, README, .envrc, repo-map, pre-commit hook), catalog.py (catalog JSON I/O — write_table_catalog, write_proc_catalog, write_view_catalog, write_function_catalog per-type writers; load_*_catalog per-type readers; snapshot_enriched_fields/restore_enriched_fields for re-extract field preservation), catalog_models.py (Pydantic v2 models for all catalog types — TableCatalog, ProcedureCatalog, ViewCatalog, FunctionCatalog — plus per-type scoping/profile sections, shared refactor/test_gen/generate sections, and reference models), catalog_dmf.py (write_catalog_files orchestration), catalog_diff.py (diff-aware classification of catalog objects — hash comparison and unchanged/changed/new/removed classification), catalog_enrich.py (offline AST enrichment CLI — BFS call graph, SELECT INTO/TRUNCATE detection), ddl_hash.py (deterministic DDL hashing — whitespace-normalized SHA-256 for definitions and canonical JSON for table signals), setup_ddl.py (DDL setup orchestration with diff-aware reexport; includes headless extract subcommand), sqlserver_extract.py (direct pyodbc extraction for SQL Server — all 13 catalog signal queries, DMF reference queries via Python loop; called by run_extract), oracle_extract.py (direct oracledb extraction for Oracle — DBMS_METADATA DDL, ALL_TAB_COLUMNS, ALL_CONSTRAINTS, ALL_DEPENDENCIES; called by run_extract), migrate.py (migration context assembly + dbt artifact writer CLI; write subcommand writes generate status to catalog), profile.py (profiling context assembly + write-back CLI), refactor.py (refactoring context assembly + catalog write-back CLI + symmetric diff logic), refactor_error_codes.md (canonical `/refactor` surfaced-code contract shared by the command and skill), test_harness.py (sandbox lifecycle CLI — reads manifest, routes to technology-specific backend, supports compare-sql equivalence audits, writes test_gen status back to catalog, and validates review payloads via validate-review), dry_run.py (migrate-util CLI entrypoint; subcommands: status — collate per-object stage statuses from catalog, ready — check stage readiness for a single object, batch-plan, exclude, sync-excluded-warnings), batch_plan.py (migrate-util batch-plan subcommand — Kahn's topological batch scheduler, catalog enumeration, output assembly; splits tables into source_tables/source_pending/pipeline buckets; output contract: output_models.BatchPlanOutput), deps.py (transitive dependency traversal — collect_deps, _expand_view_refs, _expand_proc_refs, dbt model detection helpers), pipeline_status.py (pipeline stage status and diagnostics — object_pipeline_status, collect_object_diagnostics, _compute_status_and_diagnostics with deduplication), generate_sources.py (generate-sources CLI — reads catalog/tables/, includes only is_source: true tables in sources.yml, reports unconfirmed/excluded/incomplete lists; --write writes dbt/models/staging/sources.yml, --strict fails on incomplete scoping), env_config.py (git-repo assertion, project-root/dbt-path/ddl-dir/catalog-dir resolution with env-var overrides), dmf_processing.py (DMF row processing helpers), sql_types.py (SQL type mappings), name_resolver.py (FQN normalization), db_connect.py (public sql_server_connect + oracle_connect connection factories — shared by setup_ddl, sqlserver_extract, oracle_extract), context_helpers.py (shared catalog context loaders: load_table_profile, load_proc_statements, load_proc_body, load_table_columns, collect_source_tables, sandbox_metadata — used by migrate.py, refactor.py), cli_utils.py (shared emit function for JSON stdout output — used by all CLI modules), diagnostics/ (extensible diagnostic registry with decorator-based check registration, two-pass runner, and cross-dialect checks — __init__.py: registry + runner + CLI, common.py: 11 cross-dialect checks, sqlserver.py: 8 SQL Server dialect-specific checks, oracle.py: Oracle-specific checks (LONG_TRUNCATION, PACKAGE_MEMBER, PIPELINED_FUNCTION); materialized_views bucket supported across known FQNs, object buckets, and reference resolution).

shared_schemas.description: JSON Schema files for catalog objects, agent I/O, skill output, test harness output, model sweep output, and shared definitions. Discover CLI output, status, batch-plan, ready, and exclude contracts have moved to Pydantic models in output_models.py.

ddl_mcp.description: MCP server for structured DDL parsing. server.py exposes list_tables, get_table_schema, list_procedures, get_procedure_body, get_dependencies, list_views, get_view_body, list_functions, get_function_body.

mssql_mcp.description: genai-toolbox config for live SQL Server queries. tools.yaml defines mssql-execute-sql tool.

migration_skills.description: Skill definitions: listing-objects/ (catalog browsing — list objects by type), analyzing-table/ (scoping — auto-detects table vs view; tables: writer discovery, procedure analysis, statement resolution; views: SQL element extraction, call tree, logic summary), generating-model/ (dbt model generation from refactored SQL, staging + mart split), profiling-table/ (profiling — auto-detects table vs view; tables: 6 questions including classification, PK, watermark, FKs, PII; views: stg/mart classification; references/ contains classification guides for fact_accumulating_snapshot and fact_periodic_snapshot disambiguation), generating-tests/ (single-table and view-backed test generation with fixture synthesis, write-through test_harness persistence, and mixed prompt support), reviewing-tests/ (LLM quality gate for test specs and review-result validation across table and view scenarios), reviewing-model/ (dbt model review with structured feedback, stable reference codes, and acknowledgements protocol; references/ contains style guidelines), refactoring-sql/ (CTE restructuring with equivalence audit), git-checkpoints/ (git checkpoint management during long-running agent tasks).

migration_commands.description: Stage-specific commands: setup-ddl.md (DDL extraction from live SQL Server with catalog signals, DMF references, and AST enrichment; also enriches view catalogs with sql+columns fields), scope.md (writer discovery), profile.md (migration profiling — routes tables to profiling-table, views/MVs to profiling-view), generate-model.md (dbt model generation), status.md (migration status dashboard — calls migrate-util status CLI for collated stage statuses, interprets results with LLM), init-ad-migration.md (prerequisite checker and installer), init-dbt.md (dbt project scaffolding), setup-sandbox.md (create throwaway sandbox DB), teardown-sandbox.md (drop sandbox DB), generate-tests.md (multi-table test generation with review loop), refactor.md (SQL CTE restructuring with equivalence audit), exclude-table.md (mark tables or views as excluded from the migration pipeline — sets excluded: true in catalog file, commits change), add-source-tables.md (mark one or more catalog tables as dbt sources with is_source: true; guards require scope to be complete), cleanup-worktrees.md (remove stale git worktrees), commit.md (stage and commit changes with a generated message), commit-push-pr.md (commit, push, and open a pull request in one step). Each is self-contained with sub-agent orchestration, worktree setup, and result summarization.

tests_migration.description: Python pytest suite: test_discover.py, test_loader_parse.py, test_block_segmenter.py, test_catalog.py, test_catalog_enrich.py, test_catalog_diff.py, test_catalog_diff_integration.py, test_ddl_hash.py, test_extract_refs.py, test_setup_ddl.py, test_init.py, test_migrate.py, test_profile.py, test_refactor.py, test_env_config.py, test_context_helpers.py (collect_source_tables with views, load_object_columns transparent table/view lookup), test_test_harness.py, test_test_harness_integration.py, test_test_harness_oracle_integration.py, test_dry_run.py (includes tests for migrate-util status/ready subcommands and exclude writer/reader scenarios), test_batch_plan.py (dep graph traversal, topological batching, pipeline status, blocking_deps boundary logic, cycle detection, catalog diagnostics, excluded object filtering, is_source exclusion, source_pending classification), test_generate_sources.py (is_source filtering, unconfirmed list, resolved table exclusion, strict mode, sources.yml content, write-source), test_sync_excluded_warnings.py (EXCLUDED_DEP warning write/clear logic), test_compare_sql_integration.py, test_diagnostics.py, test_diagnostics_sqlserver.py, test_diagnostics_oracle.py. Fixtures: ddl/, ddl_unparseable/, discover/flat/ (with catalog/ subdirectory containing tables/, procedures/, views/ — view catalog stubs used by test_discover.py view show/scoping tests), discover/unparseable/, catalog/ (table and procedure JSON fixtures), migrate/ (DDL, catalog with procedures/tables/views, dbt project fixture, manifest.json), profile/ (DDL, catalog with procedures/tables/views, manifest.json — views/ contains vw_simple, vw_multi, mv_monthly fixtures for view profiling tests), test_harness/ (manifest.json for sandbox tests), dry_run/ (manifest, catalog, procedures, test-specs, dbt project with compiled artifacts), sql/ (Docker SQL Server setup scripts), fixtures/setup_ddl/oracle/ (ALL_OBJECTS fixture for SH/HR list-schemas tests plus full SH extraction fixtures: all_tab_columns.json, all_constraints_pk_uk.json, all_constraints_fk.json, identity_columns.json, object_types.json, dependencies_proc/view/func.json, proc_params.json, definitions.json, all_views.json — used by TestExtractOracleUnit), fixtures/batch_plan/ (8-object multi-dep fixture: 6 tables + 2 views across all pipeline phases including proc→proc→table chains and proc→view chains; dbt staging model for silver.dimcustomer).

tests_evals.description: Promptfoo eval harness for skill and command testing against MigrationTest schema. Per-scenario fixtures under fixtures/<package>/<scenario-slug>/ — each scenario has its own isolated fixture directory. Skill packages: listing-objects, profiling-table, generating-model, generating-tests, reviewing-tests, reviewing-model, analyzing-table, refactoring-sql, view-pipeline. Command packages: cmd-scope, cmd-profile, cmd-generate-model, cmd-generate-tests, cmd-status, cmd-refactor, cmd-commit-push-pr. Live DB packages: oracle-live (extract+scope+profile against Docker Oracle), mssql-live (extract+scope+profile against Docker SQL Server). Regression packages: oracle-regression (per-command pipeline coverage against SH schema fixtures). Assertions use AJV schema validation via shared schema-helpers.js module. No top-level config — npm run eval chains all package evals. See docs/design/eval-harness/README.md.

tests_ddl_mcp.description: Python pytest suite for the DDL MCP server. test_server.py tests all MCP tool handlers. fixtures/oracle/ contains Oracle SH-schema DDL fixtures (tables, procedures, views, manifest.json) for dialect-aware column type tests and live integration tests (@pytest.mark.oracle).

scripts.description: Developer scripts: setup-worktree.sh, restore-dw-samples.sh, publish-sqlserver-image.sh (build + push SQL Server Docker image with pre-baked data files), build-dacpac-extract.sh, sql/ (test DB creation scripts and JSON fixtures).

docker_sqlserver.description: Dockerfile for SQL Server test image. Pins a specific CU tag and COPYs pre-built MDF/LDF data files so KimballFixture + MigrationTest are immediately available on docker run. data/ is ephemeral (gitignored) — produced by scripts/publish-sqlserver-image.sh during the build.

docs.description: Documentation. Use docs/design/README.md as the index for design topics. reference/ contains operator and contributor docs, and requirements/ contains product requirements.

test_fixtures.description: Cross-dialect Kimball DW fixture for integration testing and demos. schema/ has DDL for SQL Server, Oracle, PostgreSQL (staging, dim, fact, gold tables + views). data/baseline/ has seed INSERT SQL per dialect (extracted from AdventureWorks2022). data/delta/ has 5 incremental scenarios (new-customer-product, scd2-address-change, scd1-name-correction, late-arriving-fact, dedup-staging). procedures/ has 20-21 stored procedures per dialect covering 11 pattern categories (standard load, CTE, join, set ops, subquery, aggregate, pivot, control flow, exec chain, view-backed, error conditions). scripts/ has csv_to_inserts.py (extraction + generation tool). parity/ has validate.py (cross-dialect parity validation script — runs full orchestrator on sql-test/oracle-test/pg-test and compares all 20 output tables across baseline and 5 delta rounds) and coverage-matrix.md (procedure → pattern category mapping).

key_directories.plugin/: Unified Claude Code plugin with commands, skills, lib, and MCP servers
key_directories.plugin/lib/: Python DDL analysis library (uv project, sqlglot-based)
key_directories.plugin/lib/shared/schemas/: JSON Schema files for catalog, agent I/O, discover CLI output, and shared definitions
key_directories.tests/unit/: Python pytest tests for shared library (discover, catalog, catalog_enrich, diagnostics, extract_refs, integration). diagnostics_helpers.py: shared helpers for diagnostic tests. Dialect-specific diagnostic tests: test_diagnostics_sqlserver.py, test_diagnostics_oracle.py
key_directories.tests/evals/: Promptfoo eval harness for skill and command testing (skill packages: listing-objects, profiling-table, generating-model, generating-tests, reviewing-tests, reviewing-model, analyzing-table, view-pipeline; command packages: cmd-scope, cmd-profile, cmd-generate-model, cmd-generate-tests)
key_directories.plugin/mcp/ddl/tests/: Python pytest tests for the DDL MCP server. fixtures/oracle/ holds Oracle SH-schema DDL fixtures and manifest.
key_directories.test-fixtures/: Cross-dialect Kimball DW fixture: schema DDL, baseline seed data, and delta scenarios for SQL Server, Oracle, PostgreSQL
key_directories.docs/design/: Architecture decision records and design specs
key_directories..claude/rules/: Shared agent rules such as coding-conventions, git-workflow, logging-policy, and codex-execution-policy
key_directories..claude/skills/: Workflow playbooks for repo-local Claude Code skills

commands.test_migration_python_integration: cd plugin/lib && uv run pytest -m integration
commands.test_migration_python_oracle: cd plugin/lib && uv run pytest -m oracle
commands.test_harness_execute_spec: cd plugin/lib && uv run test-harness execute-spec --spec <path>
commands.migrate_util_status: cd plugin/lib && uv run migrate-util status [<fqn>]
commands.migrate_util_ready: cd plugin/lib && uv run migrate-util ready <fqn> <stage>
commands.migrate_util_exclude: cd plugin/lib && uv run migrate-util exclude <fqn> [fqn ...]
commands.migrate_util_sync_excluded_warnings: cd plugin/lib && uv run migrate-util sync-excluded-warnings
commands.refactor_context: cd plugin/lib && uv run refactor context --table <schema.table>
commands.refactor_write: cd plugin/lib && uv run refactor write --table <schema.table> --refactored-sql-file <path> --status ok|partial|error
commands.refactor_sweep: cd plugin/lib && uv run refactor sweep --tables <fqn1> --tables <fqn2> [--project-root <path>]
commands.compare_sql: cd plugin/lib && uv run test-harness compare-sql --sql-a-file <extracted.sql> --sql-b-file <refactored.sql> --spec <spec-path>

conventions.commits: Granular — one concern per commit. Stage specific files (git add <file>, not git add .).

notes_for_agents.startup: Read this file before exploring code. It is the primary startup context for structure, entrypoints, modules, and commands.
notes_for_agents.plugin_loading: Load the ad-migration plugin with: claude --plugin-dir plugin/ CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT points to the plugin root (plugin/).
notes_for_agents.ddl_filenames: The loader auto-detects object types from CREATE statements — .sql filenames are not significant. Any directory of .sql files works.
notes_for_agents.catalog_mandatory: discover.py requires catalog/ files from setup-ddl. Errors if catalog is missing. No AST fallback.
notes_for_agents.parse_errors: sqlglot parse failures are hard errors (DdlParseError). The loader does not silently skip unparseable DDL.
notes_for_agents.python_tests: Two pytest suites: (1) shared lib — cd plugin/lib && uv run pytest; SQL Server integration: uv run pytest -m integration; Oracle integration: uv run pytest -m oracle. (2) DDL MCP server — cd plugin/mcp/ddl && uv run pytest.
notes_for_agents.mssql_env_vars: Live SQL Server access requires MSSQL_HOST, MSSQL_PORT, MSSQL_DB, SA_PASSWORD exported before launching claude.
notes_for_agents.update_repo_map: Refresh this file whenever any entry here becomes stale, especially after architecture, entrypoint, command, module, package, test/eval layout, or documentation-index changes.
